zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Fitton於大約1246年出生時，她的父親Sir Edward de Fitton27歲，母親Mary Harbottle21歲。她和Sir William Howard Justice Of Common Pleas至少有3個兒子。她去世於1310年7月16日在英國諾福爾可易亞斯特 文其享年65歲，埋葬在英國諾福爾可易亞斯特 文其。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Fitton于大约1246年出生时，她的父亲Sir Edward de Fitton27岁，母亲Mary Harbottle21岁。她和Sir William Howard Justice Of Common Pleas至少有3个儿子。她去世于1310年7月16日在英国諾福爾可易亞斯特 文其享年65岁，埋葬在英国諾福爾可易亞斯特 文其。

nameMeanings.name: Fitton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: from Middle English fiton, fittin ‘lie, falsehood’, for a lier or cheat.

possibly a habitational name from Fitton Hall in Leverington, Cambridgeshire, named in Anglo-Scandinavian as ‘settlement by the meadow-land’, from Old English tūn + Old Norse fit, a term denoting grassland on the bank of a river.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Fitton was born about 1246, her father, Sir Edward de Fitton, was 27 and her mother, Mary Harbottle, was 21. She had at least 3 sons with Sir William Howard Justice Of Common Pleas. She died on 16 July 1310, in East Winch, Norfolk, England, at the age of 65, and was buried in East Winch, Norfolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Fitton est née environ 1246, son père, Sir Edward de Fitton, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Mary Harbottle, avait 21 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils avec Sir William Howard Justice Of Common Pleas. Elle est décédée le 16 juillet 1310, à East Winch, Norfolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterrée à East Winch, Norfolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Fitton um 1246 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Edward de Fitton 27 und ihre Mutter Mary Harbottle 21. Sie hatte mit Sir William Howard Justice Of Common Pleas mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb am 16. Juli 1310 im Alter von 65 Jahren in East Winch, Norfolk, England und wurde in East Winch, Norfolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Fitton è nata il circa 1246, sua padre, Sir Edward de Fitton, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Mary Harbottle, aveva 21 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli con Sir William Howard Justice Of Common Pleas. Morì il 16 luglio 1310, nel East Winch, Norfolk, England, all'età di 65 anni, e fu sepolta a East Winch, Norfolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Fittonが約1246年に生まれた時，父Sir Edward de Fittonは27歳，母Mary Harbottleは21歳であった。彼女はSir William Howard Justice Of Common Pleasとの間に少なくとも3人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1310年7月16日にイギリスノーフォルクエアスト ウィンチで65歳で死去し，イギリスノーフォルクエアスト ウィンチにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Fitton(이)가 대략 1246년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Edward de Fitton(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary Harbottle(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 Sir William Howard Justice Of Common Pleas(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1310년 7월 16일 영국 노르폴크 이스트 윈치에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르폴크 이스트 윈치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Fitton nasceu aproximadamente 1246, seu pai, Sir Edward de Fitton, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Mary Harbottle, tinha 21 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos com Sir William Howard Justice Of Common Pleas. Ela faleceu em 16 de julho de 1310, em East Winch, Norfolk, Inglaterra, com 65 anos, e foi sepultada em East Winch, Norfolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Fitton родилась около 1246 г., её отцу по имени Sir Edward de Fitton было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Harbottle, 21. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына от Sir William Howard Justice Of Common Pleas. Она умерла 16 июля 1310 г. в местности эаст винч, норфолк, Англия в возрасте 65 лет и была похоронена в местности эаст винч, норфолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice Fitton nació aproximadamente 1246, su papá, Sir Edward de Fitton, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Mary Harbottle, tenía 21 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos con Sir William Howard Justice Of Common Pleas. Murió el 16 de julio de 1310, en East Winch, Norfolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 65 años, y fue sepultada en East Winch, Norfolk, Inglaterra.
